  • Constructor Details

    • GameBoard

      public GameBoard(int numberOfPlayers)

  • Method Details

    • initClouds

      public void initClouds(int numberOfPlayers)
      This method is used to initialise the Arraylist clouds
      Parameters:
      numberOfPlayers - is used to determine the number of students on each cloud

    • addTower

      public void addTower(Tower tower)

    • initIslands

      public void initIslands()
      This method is used to initialise the attribute islands and to place the students on each island

    • assignInfluencePoints

      public void assignInfluencePoints(int island) throws EndGameException
      This method is used to assign influence points to players and towers
      Parameters:
      island - index of the island which will be considered to calculate influence points
      Throws:
      EndGameException - because it calls majority. this exception is handled by the gameController

    • majority

      public void majority(int island) throws EndGameException
      This method is used to determine the tower of a certain island or group of islands
      Parameters:
      island - index of the island whose tower must be determined
      Throws:
      EndGameException - because it calls tower.decreaseAvailableTowers(). This exception is passed on to the calling method

    • mergeIslands

      public void mergeIslands(int first, int second) throws EndGameException
      This method is used to merge island when they are controlled by the same island
      Parameters:
      first - index of the island that will accept the students from the secondo island
      second - index of the island that will be merged in the first one and will be eliminated
      Throws:
      EndGameException - if the number of the remaining island reaches 3

    • addIgnoredColor

      public void addIgnoredColor(StudentColor color)

    • resetIgnoredColor

      public void resetIgnoredColor()

    • getIgnoredColor

      public StudentColor getIgnoredColor()

    • getStudentsFromCloud

      public ArrayList<StudentColor> getStudentsFromCloud(int cloud) throws LastStudentDrawnException
      This method is used to take the students from a certain cloud
      Parameters:
      cloud - index of the cloud from which students must be taken
      Throws:
      LastStudentDrawnException - because it calls bag.draw(). this exception will be handled by GameController

    • takeStudents

      public ArrayList<StudentColor> takeStudents(int cloud)

    • moveMotherNature

      public void moveMotherNature(int movements)
